admin.noShippingZonesHint: Create global zones that Providers and Creators can use as defaults.
admin.deleteShippingZoneConfirm: This will remove the zone from the platform. Providers and Creators who were using this zone as a reference will not be affected — their own shipping profiles remain intact.
admin.commissionExplanation: Platform takes {rate} from each order. The cost is deducted from Provider's or Creator's share based on who created the promotion.
admin.creatorsActivateLanguagesHint: Creators can only activate languages enabled here.
admin.leaveBlankAnyAmount: Leave blank to allow any amount.
admin.registrationApprovalsHint: When enabled, new registrations require manual admin approval before the account is activated.
admin.providerApprovalHint: New Providers must be verified by admin before adding products
admin.creatorApprovalHint: New Creators must be verified by admin before opening their store
admin.paymentsStripeSubtitle: The platform Stripe account used to collect payments and split payouts to creators.
admin.stripeUsingEnvFallback: Currently using the STRIPE_* environment variables. Saving a key here overrides them.
admin.stripeWebhookHint: From the Stripe webhook endpoint. Make sure the endpoint also listens to connected-account events (account.updated).
admin.emailSmtpSubtitle: Outgoing email server for order confirmations, password resets and notifications.
admin.smtpUsingEnvFallback: Currently using the SMTP_* environment variables. Saving here overrides them.
admin.legalPagesSubtitle: Manage the platform's legal pages shown to all customers.
admin.legalEmptyForLocale: No content for this language yet
admin.notificationTemplatesSubtitle: Edit the transactional emails customers receive (subject and body per language).

myStore.title: My Store

myStore.designMovedDesc: Colors, fonts, and layout are now edited in the visual builder. This page handles store info, contact, languages, and SEO.
myStore.customDomainHelp: Works with both a subdomain (shop.yourbrand.com) and an apex domain (yourbrand.com). In your DNS provider, add a CNAME record from this domain to {target}. For apex domains, use Cloudflare (which supports CNAME flattening) or an ALIAS/ANAME record. Changes may take a few minutes to take effect.
myStore.dnsGuideIntro: Open the DNS settings for {zone} in your provider and add the following record:
myStore.dnsApexNote: This is an apex (root) domain. Standard DNS does not allow a CNAME at the root — use Cloudflare (CNAME flattening) or a provider that supports ALIAS/ANAME records.
myStore.dnsCloudflareNote: If your DNS is on Cloudflare, keep the orange cloud proxy enabled to get automatic SSL.
myStore.dnsPropagationNote: DNS changes may take a few minutes to propagate.
